about.title: Learning Built for Real Careers
about.desc: Edu Learning & Immersion is a modern language training platform focused on practical, skill-based education.

programs.title: Explore Our Career-Focused Programs
programs.desc: From general language courses to specialized corporate training, we have the right program for your goals.
programs.p1Desc: Comprehensive language courses from beginner to advanced, with focus on speaking, writing, listening and reading skills.
programs.p2Desc: Specialized programs for corporate communication, presentations, negotiations, and workplace language skills.
programs.p3Desc: Professional document translation, simultaneous interpretation, and localization services for all your needs.

projects.title: Learning Platforms & Projects We’ve Built
projects.desc: We create scalable platforms designed for online courses and professional training.

features.title: Built for Learners, Driven by Outcomes
features.f1Desc: Learn from instructors with real industry experience who guide you step by step through your learning journey.
features.f2Desc: Practice what you learn with real-world projects and conversation exercises that build lasting skills.
features.f3Desc: Programs designed with industry needs in mind, preparing you for professional communication in any setting.
features.f4Desc: Earn certificates recognized by employers and institutions worldwide upon successful course completion.

skills.title: Skills That Prepare You for Real Opportunities
skills.desc: Our programs are designed to help you build practical knowledge, apply real-world skills, and grow with confidence.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.desc: Real feedback from students who completed courses at Edu Learning.
testimonials.t1Title: The lessons are practical and easy to follow.
testimonials.t1Text: Edu Learning helped me build real skills and confidence to start my career successfully and grow with clear direction.
testimonials.t2Title: I improved my professional English fast.
testimonials.t2Text: The corporate training was exactly what we needed. Professional, structured, and delivered real results within weeks.
testimonials.t3Text: The hands-on exercises helped me understand concepts faster than expected and apply them with confidence.
testimonials.t4Text: I gained confidence and skills that I can use in real jobs and personal projects going forward.

pricing.title: Flexible Plans for Every Learner
pricing.desc: Choose a plan that fits your learning goals and grow at your own pace with confidence.
pricing.plan1Desc: Perfect for beginners starting their learning journey.
pricing.plan2Desc: Best for learners who want full access and practical projects.
pricing.plan3Desc: For small teams and organizations that want to scale learning.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Helpful information to guide your learning journey.
faq.q1: Who can enroll in Edu Learning courses?
faq.a1: Anyone interested in building practical skills can enroll. Our courses are beginner-friendly and suitable for students and professionals.
faq.q2: Do I get a certificate after completion?
faq.a2: Yes! Upon completing our programs, learners receive certificates recognized by employers and academic institutions worldwide.
faq.q3: Do I get lifetime access to the courses?
faq.a3: Active subscribers have full access to their enrolled courses. Materials remain available throughout your subscription period.
faq.a4: Absolutely. Our programs start from beginner level and progress through intermediate to advanced, with personalized pacing.

cta.title: Start Your Learning Journey Today
cta.desc: Join thousands of learners building real-world language skills and growing their careers with confidence.

programs.p8Desc: Tailored language programs for teams and organizations with flexible delivery.
programs.p9Desc: Full immersion experience with daily classes, cultural activities and real-world practice.

corporate.subtitle: Solutions for modern teams
corporate.b1Desc: Training tailored to your industry, team size, and specific language goals.
corporate.b2Desc: Choose from in-person, virtual, or hybrid formats that fit your team's workflow.
corporate.b3Desc: Certified instructors with corporate training experience across industries.
corporate.b4Desc: Detailed analytics and reports to measure team improvement and ROI.
corporate.b5Desc: Combine group sessions with 1-on-1 coaching for maximum impact.

corporate.step1: Assess your team's current language levels

about.heroDesc: Empowering individuals and organizations with language skills that transform careers and open doors.
about.missionText: To provide exceptional language training and communication solutions that empower people to connect across cultures, advance their careers, and achieve their goals.
about.visionText: To be the most trusted and impactful language education provider, recognized for quality, innovation, and the real-world success of our learners.
about.storyText1: Edu Learning & Immersion was founded with a simple belief: language is the key to opportunity. What started as a small tutoring initiative has grown into a comprehensive training organization serving learners across 25+ countries.
about.storyText2: Our approach combines the best of traditional teaching with modern immersive techniques, creating programs that deliver real results.
about.v1Desc: We deliver the highest quality training with certified instructors and proven methods.
about.v2Desc: Language education should be available to everyone, everywhere.
about.v3Desc: We embrace modern teaching techniques and technology to enhance learning.
about.v4Desc: Everything we do is measured by the real-world results our learners achieve.
about.tm1Desc: 15+ years in language education and international training.
about.tm2Desc: Native French speaker, certified DELF examiner.
about.tm3Desc: Specialist in corporate communication and team development.
about.tm4Desc: 10+ years in professional translation and localization.
about.ctaDesc: Get in touch and discover how we can help you achieve your language goals.
